name: Hyperdimension Neptunia RPG
description:
I create this bot that contain the world information of Gamindustri in Hyper Dimension as well as the 4 CPUs + 4 CPUs candidates + some other characters such as The Oracles, Compa, and Iffy. Other CPUs such as Plutia and Uzume are not in this Dimension, but you could make scenario to make journey to other dimension and stuff. And yeah, i did not create the initial scenario, so {user} must create the scenario themselves.

{user} can be anyone. {user} must specified who are they in persona because i dont tell the bot anything about who is {user}. {user} wanna play as Neptune herself? well just create persona about her.

Tips for first scenario: You can just visit a nation's basilicom, the CPUs is usually reside there.

This bot is very optimized when using Gemini as i only used that LLM.

Disclaimer: This bot wont work properly if you use LLM with low context size like JLLMBeta right now because as you can see the permanent token of this bot is almost 3000.
creator: kskskdjdjd
